title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Gynecologist
shortInfo: CMHO Rajnandgaon Gynecologist Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 Gynecologist post. Candidates with Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology can apply offline through rajnandgaon.nic.in on or before 02 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: CMHO Rajnandgaon Gynecologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Chief Medical and Health Office Rajnandgaon
basic_details.short_information: CMHO Rajnandgaon Gynecologist Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 Gynecologist post. Candidates with Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology can apply offline through rajnandgaon.nic.in on or before 02 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the CMHO Rajnandgaon Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in the relevant specialty or Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology from a recognized university; valid live registration with Chhattisgarh or other state Medical Council or Indian Medical Council

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.rajnandgaon.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CMHO Rajnandgaon Gynecologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CMHO Rajnandgaon Gynecologist recruitment is 02-06-2026.

faq.question: What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Gynecologist.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Gynecologist post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Gynecologist post.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Gynecologist post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Gynecologist post ranges from Rs. 150000 to Rs. 175000 per month.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Gynecologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology from a recognized university and have valid live registration with the Medical Council.

faq.question: What is the minimum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for this recruitment is 18 years.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the CMHO Rajnandgaon Gynecologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Merit List and Document Verification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
